body_paragraphs: I am applying for the RTO Quality & Compliance Officer position at Australian Trade Training College. The role's focus on audit support, document control, training records and practical process improvement closely matches the work I have completed across occupational health, infrastructure and business administration.

At Thiess, I maintained compliance training, certification records, registers and audit documentation for a workforce of more than 150 across multiple project sites. Systematic pre-audit gap analysis and document control contributed to zero non-compliance findings across three major safety audits. At 4cRisk, I improved training and certification tracking, reducing audit preparation time by 15%, while managing confidential health and workers compensation records.

My compliance experience has been in WHS and occupational health rather than directly within an RTO, so I would bring strong transferable controls while building current knowledge of ASQA processes, the 2025 Standards for RTOs, validation and Training and Assessment Strategies. I also hold a Certificate IV in Training and Assessment and have extensive experience learning new systems, maintaining accurate records and coordinating stakeholders under firm deadlines.

After operating my own creative design and business administration practice for nearly ten years, I am deliberately returning to a team-based role where careful systems and reliable administration support a clear community purpose. ATTC's work developing trade skills in the region, together with the opportunity to learn from the Self Assurance & Quality Lead, makes this a strong next step.

proof.label: Relevant Fit
proof.text: 15+ years in regulated administration | zero findings across three major audits | Certificate IV in Training and Assessment | Moreton Bay based
